resources.string: This interactive tutorial will guide you through the rules and controls of Domino Blockade. You can skip this at any time.
The board is where you place your dominoes. Each domino you place must match an open end of the chain already on the board.
These are your tiles. At the start, each player gets 7 tiles (5 in a 3-4 player game). Tap a tile to select it, then place it on a matching end of the board.
Match one end of your tile with an open end on the board. If you cannot play, you must draw from the boneyard or pass your turn.
When you cannot play, draw tiles from the boneyard. If the boneyard is empty and you still cannot play, your turn is passed automatically.
The first player to empty their hand wins! If the game is blocked (no one can play), the player with the lowest total pip count wins. Good luck!
